parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ template_uuid: $json.templateUuid, layers: { media: { image: $json.newImageUrl }, headline: { text: $json.hook }, subtext: { text: ($json.caption || "").substring(0, 30) } }, create_now: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({model:"gpt-4",messages:[{role:"system",content:"You are an Instagram content editor for a beauty brand. Refine the given text: fix grammar, match professional yet warm tone, ensure it is concise. Return ONLY the refined text, nothing else."},{role:"user",content:"Refine this Instagram " + $json.field + ": " + $json.newText}],temperature:0.5,max_tokens:500}) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ template_uuid: $json.templateUuid, layers: { headline: { text: $json.newHook }, subtext: { text: ($json.newCaption || "").substring(0, 30) } }, create_now: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({model:"gpt-4",messages:[{role:"system",content:"You are an Instagram content strategist for a beauty brand. Generate fresh content. Return ONLY valid JSON with fields: topic, hook, caption, hashtags (array), callToAction, visualDirection."},{role:"user",content:"Generate a new " + $json.contentType + " post for " + $json.day + ". Pillar: " + $json.pillar + ". Previous topic was: " + $json.topic + " - create something DIFFERENT."}],temperature:0.8,max_tokens:1000}) }}
